role_title: Head of Global Revenue Operations, In-Store

level_signals: 15+ years of experience in Sales Operations, Marketing Operations, Strategy, and/or Sales Leadership
Build and lead a high-performing, results-oriented Revenue Operations & Strategy organization
Comp range $181,800–$267,300 base, consistent with senior Director / VP-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 15+ years of experience in Sales Operations, Marketing Operations, Strategy, and/or Sales Leadership roles in B2B SaaS environments
You have a proven track record of leading change management, building aligned tooling, and developing methods to plan, forecast, measure and systemize Sales KPIs for internal teams and customers

You have deep understanding of standard business practices related to Marketing & Sales Operations processes and systems, as well as sales enablement best practices, training methodologies, and content management
You have demonstrated experience in designing sales commission plans at scale, including analysis, modeling, and optimization to drive revenue growth and align incentives with strategic objectives

You can thrive in an ambiguous environment with high autonomy, build productive relationships across all organizational levels, and have excellent communication skills with executive-level partners, plus expertise with GTM tools including Salesforce and enablement platforms
You can thrive in an ambiguous environment with high autonomy, build productive relationships across all organizational levels, and have excellent communication skills with executive-level partners

scope.surface: Global Revenue Operations for DoorDash In-Store / SevenRooms GTM function including sales ops, CS ops, enablement, systems, planning, and compensation
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS (SevenRooms acquired by DoorDash; in-store restaurant tech)
primary_metrics_inferred: Funnel conversion metrics across all lead sources
core_responsibilities: Build and lead a high-performing, results-oriented Revenue Operations & Strategy organization
Lead bottoms-up business planning, target-setting, and own a 'rhythm of the business' framework
Provide analytics and reporting for the Revenue organization, including forecasting, pipeline analysis, and funnel metrics
Own all systems and tools related to sales & Customer Success with SFDC as the central hub
Ensure alignment between enablement strategies and revenue goals
Partner with Finance and People teams to design and manage sales commission strategy

green_flags: Clear scope of ownership: systems, enablement, planning, compensation, analytics
Cross-functional footprint is well-defined (Sales, CS, Finance, People, etc.)
Integration context (SevenRooms acquisition) provides interesting organizational challenge
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: Location type is not stated in the JD body — remote eligibility and office requirements are entirely unclear
No equity or bonus mentioned despite VP/Head-of-function level role
SevenRooms acquisition integration context may introduce organizational uncertainty and complexity

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement, 'Head of' title, and comp range)
seniority.manages_people (inferred from 'Build and lead a high-performing... organization')

ambiguities: Location type is not specified in the JD body — no mention of remote, hybrid, or on-site requirement. The NYC AEDT notice implies potential NYC presence but does not confirm this as a required work location.
No mention of equity compensation despite seniority level — unclear if omitted or not part of package.
The role straddles DoorDash and SevenRooms organizational lines post-acquisition; reporting structure is ambiguous.
